narration: Witness the electrifying journey of TERMI, India's pride, as he leads Cloud9 to victory in the grand finals. Feel the adrenaline, hear the crowd, and celebrate the triumph of skill and passion.
visual_prompts: A wide-angle shot of TERMI in his Cloud9 jersey, sitting at a high-end gaming PC, surrounded by his four teammates. The stage is vibrant with dynamic lighting, casting colorful reflections on their faces. The crowd in the background is roaring and chanting 'TERMI! TERMI!' with an intense atmosphere. Capture the professional setup with multiple monitors, gaming peripherals, and esports banners.

A close-up shot of TERMI's face as he makes a critical play in the game. His expressions show intense focus and determination. The background shows the virtual game environment with highlights and graphics typical of a Valorant match. Use side lighting to emphasize his concentration.

A celebratory shot of TERMI and his teammates jumping up in joy after winning the championship. The stage is bathed in triumphant lights with confetti falling. Capture the emotional moment with dynamic camera movements and close-ups of their jubilant expressions. Include the crowd's ecstatic reaction in the background.
